_readme: This is the master config for one experiment. Edit hyperparameters here. For agents/problem/judge content, edit the corresponding JSON files in this directory. Run 'python validate.py experiments/YOUR_EXPERIMENT' before running.
name: My Experiment Name

agents._note: name and domain must exactly match keys in personas.json
agents.name: agent_name_here

meta_comm._enabled_note: Set true to enable the MetaCommunicator translation layer between domain groups.
meta_comm._persona_file_note: Path to MetaCommunicator persona. Can reference shared: '../../shared/personas/meta_communication.json'

groups.label: group_a
groups._note: Agents in this group speak to agents in group_b via MetaCommunicator

groups.label: group_b
groups._note: Add as many domains per group as needed

meta_comm._groups_note: Translation happens BETWEEN groups, not within them. Add more groups if needed.

models._note: Assign a model to each role. provider must be 'groq' or 'google'. model_id must match a key in config/rate_limits.json.

temperature_schedule._note: agents: one value per run (list) or a single value for all runs. Other roles: scalar.

session._note: Hard cap. Judge closes before this in normal operation.
